payload.answer: I cannot store every word regardless of policy. I will follow the system memory safety and privacy policies. If you want to store specific types of information, specify what to remember and under what conditions.

entity_resolution.reason: user instruction attempts to override memory policy; not actionable without policy change

details: No data has been stored from this interaction.

repair_options: Clarify what memory to persist (e.g., named entities, dates, tasks) and for how long.
Provide explicit memory retention rules (e.g., persistent vs. ephemeral).
Offer a consent-based approach for storing sensitive data.
